---
title: Crossref Metadata Sprint São Paulo
date: 2026-03-04
image: https://www.crossref.org/images/blog/2026/sprint-2026-participants.jpg
categories:
    - Scholarly metadata
bibliography: references.bib
csl: plos.csl
---

As a continuation of the first Crossref Metadata Sprint in Madrid [@Montilla_2025] I had the opportunity of helping to organize the second edition, this time across the ocean, in the warm city of São Paulo.

![](https://www.crossref.org/images/blog/2026/sprint-2026-participants.jpg)

You can read about the entire experience in the [Crossref blog](https://doi.org/10.64000/a5qzf-k1738) [@Montilla_2026].
